summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 6 features: Scroll animations replay (viewport once:false), Admin CMS for Portfolio (full CRUD), and Admin CMS for Home Services. All 13 backend API tests pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/home-services returns 4 default service items (Residential, Commercial, Land & Development, Construction Progress)
GET /api/portfolio returns 6 portfolio items
Admin login with valid credentials (isaacsarver100@gmail.com)
GET /api/admin/portfolio returns 6 portfolio items for admin
GET /api/admin/portfolio requires authentication (401 without token)
POST /api/admin/portfolio creates new portfolio item
PUT /api/admin/portfolio/{id} updates portfolio item
DELETE /api/admin/portfolio/{id} deletes portfolio item
GET /api/admin/home-services returns 4 services for editing
GET /api/admin/home-services requires authentication (401 without token)
PUT /api/admin/home-services saves updated services
GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats
Cleanup test portfolio items (TEST_ prefix)
Home page services section loads 4 service cards from API
Admin dashboard has Portfolio nav item
Admin dashboard has Home Services nav item
Admin Portfolio page loads with 6 items and Add Item button
Admin Portfolio Edit form works (shows pre-filled data)
Admin Portfolio has Edit/Delete buttons for each item
Admin Home Services page loads with 4 editable service cards
Admin Home Services has Save Services button
Portfolio public page shows 6 items with category filters
Viewport once:false set on all pages (Home, Services, About, Pricing, Portfolio)
seed_data_creation: None - portfolio already has 6 seeded items from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working: (1) Scroll animations replay - viewport once:false set on all pages (Home, Services, About, Pricing, Portfolio), (2) Admin Portfolio CMS - full CRUD working (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), 6 items in DB, (3) Admin Home Services CMS - GET/PUT working, 4 services editable, (4) Home page fetches services from /api/home-services API with fallback to defaults, (5) Admin dashboard now has 9 nav items including Portfolio and Home Services. Email notifications remain MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email notifications fall back to mock mode when SMTP is not configured.

scroll_animations_replay.details: viewport={{ once: false }} set on all motion components across Home.js, Services.js, About.js, Pricing.js, Portfolio.js

admin_portfolio_cms.details: Full CRUD: GET list, POST create, PUT update, DELETE remove. 6 seeded items. Edit form with Title, Location, Category, Image URL, Description, Before/After Image URLs

admin_home_services_cms.details: GET/PUT endpoints. 4 services editable with Title, Description, Image URL, Column Span. Save Services button persists changes

home_page_api_integration.details: Home page fetches from /api/home-services, falls back to hardcoded defaults if API fails
